summary: The user is planning a trip to Japan, specifically to Osaka, Kyoto, and Nara, and is seeking recommendations for restaurants, accommodations, and activities. They have booked their trip through Happy Trails Travel Agency and are using Kayak to compare prices on hotels and flights, including setting up price alerts for flights to Rome.
facts: The user is planning a trip to Japan, focusing on Osaka, Kyoto, and Nara. The user booked their Japan trip last month with Happy Trails Travel Agency. The user is using Kayak to compare prices on hotels in Osaka and Kyoto. The user has set up a price alert on Kayak for flights to Rome and receives notifications every few days. The user is looking for convenient and comfortable places to stay in Osaka and Kyoto. The user is interested in trying local specialties in Nara, such as kakinoha-zushi and menbere. The user is considering adding a day trip to Nara to their Japan itinerary. The user is looking for recommendations for restaurants in Osaka and Kyoto. The user is planning to take a guided Tokyo city tour during their trip.
